properties.trailName: Kastri and the City of the Dead
properties.summary: A closed-loop walk linking the Catholic Shrine of the Holy Unmercenaries, the Jadeite source, Chalandriani, and the fortified prehistoric headland of Kastri.
properties.basedOn: Route geometry is derived from the supplied Syros_Custom_route.KML closed loop and the waypoint coordinates provided for Kastri, Chalandriani, Jadeite, and the Catholic shrine.
properties.note: This version uses the uploaded closed-loop KML rather than the earlier prototype line, so the Leaflet route now follows the intended Kastri circuit.

properties.name: Catholic Shrine of the Holy Unmercenaries
properties.description: The loop begins at the Catholic Shrine of the Holy Unmercenaries, a high starting point overlooking the northern landscape of Apano Meria.

properties.name: Jadeite
properties.description: This stop marks the jadeite source associated with Syros's Early Bronze Age communities and their long-distance material connections.

properties.name: Chalandriani
properties.description: Chalandriani is one of the most important Early Cycladic cemetery landscapes in the Aegean, spread across the plateau below the ridge route.

properties.name: Kastri
properties.description: Kastri is the fortified prehistoric headland settlement above the sea, the culminating archaeological point of the loop and the site that gives the trail its focus.
